creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #7)

I don't really understand how the stray directory ends up in the plist in the first place.

So I am unclear as to how patching setup.py would fix this.

At first I tried patching the plist in the post-install target. But that didn't work. So my suspicion was that something was updating the plist after post-install.

Just for my enlightenment, why is using pre-package wrong?
